PostToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then pnpm run type-check 2>&1 | tail -20; fi

PreToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '^dist/|pnpm-lock\.yaml$'; then echo 'BLOCK: Do not edit generated files (dist/) or lock files (pnpm-lock.yaml)' && exit 1; fi
